subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast attained to the truth of that divine Light which is mentioned in the twelfth chapter of the Gospel according to John!
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فائز بحقیقت آن نور الهی که در اصحاح دوازدهم یوحنا مذکور امیدوارم که
